title: Judge Dredd Lawgiver
description: Adds Lawgiver from Judge Dredd, complete with 13 unique firing modes!
body:
![Lawgiver in center, row of 3 bullets beneath it, 3 stacked computer chips to the left of the gun, and to the right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83734207366a1a2d5c31766bfcccf6dccc8d7617.png)

**Winner of the [2025 CurseForge ModJam](https://mod.curseforge.com/minecraft-modjam/)**


## Overview

Adds Judge Dredd's iconic gun Lawgiver as a craftable weapon! Data chips can be found in loot chests around the world, allowing 13 total modes to be unlocked for this futuristic weapon.

## Cheats

**Get Lawgiver**
```
/function code:debug/get/lawgiver
```
**Get ammo for Lawgiver**
```
/function code:debug/get/lawgiver_ammo
```
**Get all Lawgiver chips**
```
/function code:debug/get/lawgiver_chips
```
**Lock all Lawgiver modes**
```
/function code:debug/relock_lawgiver
```
**Unlock all Lawgiver modes**
```
/function code:debug/unlock_lawgiver
```
**Uninstalls data pack** _[data pack version only!]_
```
/function ac_cheat:uninstall
```
